nl_prompt: What was total gross revenue last quarter?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(line_value) AS total_gross_revenue
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= DATE_TRUNC('quarter', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '3 months'
  AND order_date < DATE_TRUNC('quarter', CURRENT_DATE)

nl_prompt: How many orders were placed this year?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(id) AS order_count
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 year'
  AND order_date < DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE)

nl_prompt: What is our average order value?
generated_sql:
SELECT AVG(line_value) AS average_order_value
FROM orders

nl_prompt: How many unique customers made a purchase in the last 6 months?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS unique_customer_count
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '6 months'
  AND order_date < CURRENT_DATE

nl_prompt: What is the total number of products in our catalog?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS product_count
FROM products

nl_prompt: What was our highest single-order revenue ever?
generated_sql:
SELECT MAX(line_value) AS highest_single_order_revenue
FROM orders

nl_prompt: How many orders were cancelled this year?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(id) AS cancelled_order_count
FROM orders
WHERE status = 'cancelled'
  AND order_date >= DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 year'
  AND order_date < DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE)

nl_prompt: What is our total revenue for Electronics products?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(line_value) AS total_revenue
FROM orders
JOIN products ON orders.product_id = products.id
WHERE products.category = 'Electronics'

nl_prompt: How many orders shipped in the last 30 days?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(id) AS shipped_order_count
FROM orders
WHERE ship_date >= DATE_TRUNC('day', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '30 days'
  AND ship_date < CURRENT_DATE

nl_prompt: What is the revenue for the top-selling product?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.name, SUM(o.line_value) AS total_revenue
FROM orders o
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: How many new customers signed up this year?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customers.id) AS new_customer_count
FROM customers
WHERE customers.created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 year'
  AND customers.created_at < CURRENT_DATE

nl_prompt: What is our total cost of goods sold this year?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(products.cost_price * orders.quantity) AS total_cogs
FROM orders
JOIN products ON orders.product_id = products.id
WHERE order_date >= DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 year'
  AND order_date < DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE)

nl_prompt: What percentage of orders were returned?
generated_sql:
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'returned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS return_rate
FROM orders

nl_prompt: How many distinct product categories do we sell?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT category) AS product_category_count
FROM products

nl_prompt: What was our total revenue last year?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(line_value) AS total_revenue
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 year'
  AND order_date < DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE)

nl_prompt: What is the revenue breakdown by product category?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.category, SUM(o.line_value) AS total_revenue
FROM orders o
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

nl_prompt: Which customers placed more than 5 orders?
generated_sql:
SELECT customers.name, COUNT(orders.id) AS order_count
FROM customers
JOIN orders ON customers.id = orders.customer_id
GROUP BY customers.id, customers.name
HAVING COUNT(orders.id) > 5

nl_prompt: Who are our top 10 customers by lifetime revenue?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.name, SUM(o.line_value) AS total_revenue
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

nl_prompt: What is the average days between order and shipment per product category?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.category, AVG(od.delivery_date - o.order_date) AS avg_days_between_order_and_shipment
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
JOIN logistics_deliveries od ON o.shipping_id = od.shipping_ref
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY avg_days_between_order_and_shipment DESC

nl_prompt: Which product categories have more than 10 percent return rate?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.category, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.status = 'returned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS return_count
FROM orders o
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.category
HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN o.status = 'returned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0.1 * COUNT(*)
ORDER BY return_count DESC

nl_prompt: What is the revenue per customer segment?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.segment, SUM(o.line_value) AS total_revenue
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.segment
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

nl_prompt: Which sales rep closed the most orders?
generated_sql:
SELECT sales_reps.rep_name, COUNT(orders.id) AS order_count
FROM sales_reps
JOIN orders ON sales_reps.id = orders.sales_rep_id
GROUP BY sales_reps.id, sales_reps.rep_name
ORDER BY order_count DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: What is the monthly revenue trend for the last 12 months?
generated_sql:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date) AS month, SUM(line_value) AS total_revenue
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 year'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date)
ORDER BY month

nl_prompt: Which products had zero orders in the last 60 days?
generated_sql:
SELECT products.name AS product_name
FROM products
LEFT JOIN order_items ON products.id = order_items.product_id
LEFT JOIN orders ON order_items.order_id = orders.id
WHERE orders.order_date >= DATE_TRUNC('day', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '60 days'
  AND orders.order_date < CURRENT_DATE
  AND order_items.quantity = 0
GROUP BY products.id, products.name
HAVING COUNT(order_items.id) = 0

nl_prompt: What is the average order value per customer segment?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.segment, AVG(o.line_value) AS average_order_value
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.segment
ORDER BY average_order_value DESC

nl_prompt: What is the revenue from completed orders versus pending orders?
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN line_value ELSE 0 END) AS completed_revenue,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'pending' THEN line_value ELSE 0 END) AS pending_revenue
FROM 
    orders

nl_prompt: Which product has the highest total quantity sold?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.name, SUM(o.quantity) AS total_quantity_sold
FROM orders o
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.name
ORDER BY total_quantity_sold DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: What is the total discount given across all orders?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(discount_pct * line_value) AS total_discount
FROM orders

nl_prompt: What is the average number of items per order by category?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.category, AVG(oi.quantity) AS average_items_per_order
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY average_items_per_order DESC

nl_prompt: What percentage of revenue comes from our top 20 percent of customers?
generated_sql:
SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN c.segment IN (SELECT segment FROM customers ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 20)) / COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id)) * 100 AS top_20_percent_revenue
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.segment
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

nl_prompt: Which customers with active CRM deals had delivery issues?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.name, COUNT(d.delivery_date) AS delivery_issue_count
FROM customers c
JOIN sf_opportunities o ON c.email = sf_accounts.email_address AND sf_accounts.account_id = o.account_id
JOIN logistics_deliveries d ON o.account_id = d.account_id
WHERE o.stage = 'Closed Won' AND d.status_code != 0
GROUP BY c.name
HAVING COUNT(d.delivery_date) > 0

{'error': 'Max retries (2) exceeded', 'last_error': 'Binder Error: Referenced table "sf_accounts" not found!
Candidate tables: "c"

LINE 3: JOIN sf_opportunities o ON c.email = sf_accounts.email_address AND sf_accounts.account_id = o...
                                             ^'}

nl_prompt: What is the average deal size for customers whose deliveries were delayed?
generated_sql:
SELECT AVG(sf_opportunities.amount) AS average_deal_size
FROM orders o
JOIN logistics_deliveries ld ON o.shipping_id = ld.shipping_ref
JOIN sf_opportunities so ON o.customer_id = so.account_id
WHERE ld.delivery_date < ld.expected_date

                   ^'}

nl_prompt: Which of our top 10 revenue customers have an open CRM opportunity?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.name, SUM(o.line_value) AS total_revenue
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
JOIN sf_opportunities so ON c.email = so.account_email_address
WHERE so.stage = 'Open'
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10
error_message:
{'error': 'Max retries (2) exceeded', 'last_error': 'Binder Error: Table "so" does not have a column named "account_email_address"

Candidate bindings: : "account_id"

LINE 4: JOIN sf_opportunities so ON c.email = so.account_email_address
                                              ^'}

nl_prompt: What is the delivery success rate for Enterprise segment customers?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.segment, COUNT(CASE WHEN d.status_code = 1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS successful_deliveries, COUNT(*) AS total_deliveries
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
JOIN logistics_deliveries d ON o.shipping_id = d.shipping_ref
WHERE c.segment = 'Enterprise'
GROUP BY c.segment
ORDER BY successful_deliveries DESC, total_deliveries DESC

nl_prompt: Total revenue from customers whose CRM deals closed successfully?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(o.line_value) AS total_revenue
FROM orders o
JOIN sf_opportunities so ON o.id = so.order_id
WHERE so.stage = 'Closed Won'
error_message:
{'error': 'Max retries (2) exceeded', 'last_error': 'Binder Error: Table "so" does not have a column named "order_id"

Candidate bindings: : "opp_id"

LINE 3: JOIN sf_opportunities so ON o.id = so.order_id
                                           ^'}

nl_prompt: Which customers have both high order value and a delayed shipment?
generated_sql:
SELECT customers.name
FROM customers
JOIN orders ON customers.id = orders.customer_id
JOIN logistics_deliveries ON orders.shipping_id = logistics_deliveries.shipping_ref
WHERE orders.line_value > 1000
  AND logistics_deliveries.delivery_date < orders.ship_date
GROUP BY customers.id, customers.name
HAVING COUNT(orders.id) > 1

nl_prompt: What is the on-time delivery rate by CRM deal stage?
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    sf_opportunities.stage, 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN d.status_code = 1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS successful_deliveries, 
    COUNT(*) AS total_deliveries
FROM 
    orders o
JOIN 
    logistics_deliveries d ON o.shipping_id = d.shipping_ref
JOIN 
    sf_opportunities ON o.id = sf_opportunities.opp_id
GROUP BY 
    sf_opportunities.stage
ORDER BY 
    successful_deliveries DESC, 
    total_deliveries DESC

nl_prompt: Which product categories have delivery complaints from high-value CRM accounts?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.category, COUNT(CASE WHEN l.status_code = 400 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS complaint_count
FROM orders o
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
JOIN logistics_deliveries l ON o.shipping_id = l.shipping_ref
JOIN sf_accounts sa ON o.customer_id = sa.account_id
WHERE p.list_price > 1000
GROUP BY p.category
HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN l.status_code = 400 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
ORDER BY complaint_count DESC

nl_prompt: What is the average time from CRM deal close to first order?
generated_sql:
SELECT AVG(T2.order_date - T1.close_date) AS avg_time_from_close_to_first_order
FROM sf_opportunities T1
LEFT JOIN orders T2 ON T1.opp_id = T2.deal_id
WHERE T2.order_date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY T1.opp_id
ORDER BY avg_time_from_close_to_first_order DESC
error_message:
{'error': 'Max retries (2) exceeded', 'last_error': 'Binder Error: Table "T2" does not have a column named "deal_id"

LINE 3: LEFT JOIN orders T2 ON T1.opp_id = T2.deal_id
                                           ^'}

nl_prompt: Which logistics carrier has the worst on-time rate for top revenue customers?
generated_sql:
SELECT l.name, AVG(CASE WHEN d.delivery_date > d.expected_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS on_time_rate
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
JOIN logistics_deliveries d ON o.shipping_id = d.shipping_ref
JOIN logistics_carriers l ON d.carrier_name = l.name
WHERE c.segment = 'Enterprise'
GROUP BY l.name
ORDER BY on_time_rate DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: Summarize delivery complaint themes for top 10 revenue customers.
generated_sql:
SELECT c.name, COUNT(r.theme) AS complaint_count
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
JOIN returns r ON o.id = r.order_id
GROUP BY c.name, r.theme
ORDER BY complaint_count DESC
LIMIT 10

nl_prompt: Which product categories have the most negative sentiment?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.category, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.status = 'returned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS return_count
FROM orders o
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.category
HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN o.status = 'returned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0.1 * COUNT(*)
ORDER BY return_count DESC

nl_prompt: What common complaints appear for delayed shipments?
generated_sql:
SELECT reason
FROM returns
JOIN orders ON returns.order_id = orders.id
JOIN logistics_deliveries ON orders.shipping_id = logistics_deliveries.shipping_ref
WHERE logistics_deliveries.delivery_date < orders.ship_date
GROUP BY reason
ORDER BY COUNT(reason) DESC
LIMIT 5

nl_prompt: Find customers who mentioned competitors in support.
generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.name
FROM customers c
JOIN support_tickets st ON c.id = st.customer_id
WHERE st.description LIKE '%competitors%'

nl_prompt: What were top 3 reasons for returns?
generated_sql:
SELECT reason, COUNT(*) AS return_count
FROM returns
GROUP BY reason
ORDER BY return_count DESC
LIMIT 3

nl_prompt: Which sales reps have customers with most positive feedback?
generated_sql:
SELECT sales_reps.rep_name, COUNT(orders.id) AS order_count
FROM sales_reps
JOIN orders ON sales_reps.id = orders.sales_rep_id
JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.id
WHERE customers.feedback_score > 0
GROUP BY sales_reps.id, sales_reps.rep_name
ORDER BY order_count DESC
LIMIT 1

              ^'}

nl_prompt: Summarize key themes for Enterprise segment accounts.
generated_sql:
SELECT c.segment, COUNT(*) AS customer_count, SUM(o.line_value) AS total_revenue
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
WHERE c.segment = 'Enterprise'
GROUP BY c.segment
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

nl_prompt: Which logistics partners have most damaged goods complaints?
generated_sql:
SELECT logistics_deliveries.carrier_name, COUNT(returns.id) AS complaint_count
FROM logistics_deliveries
JOIN returns ON logistics_deliveries.shipping_ref = returns.order_id
WHERE returns.reason = 'damaged goods'
GROUP BY logistics_deliveries.carrier_name
ORDER BY complaint_count DESC
LIMIT 5

nl_prompt: What do churned customers say were top reasons for leaving?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.name, r.reason
FROM customers c
JOIN returns r ON c.id = r.customer_id
WHERE c.status = 'churned'
GROUP BY c.name, r.reason
ORDER BY COUNT(r.reason) DESC
LIMIT 3

nl_prompt: Find orders where complaints mention product defects.
generated_sql:
SELECT orders.id, orders.line_value, returns.reason
FROM orders
JOIN returns ON orders.id = returns.order_id
WHERE returns.reason LIKE '%product defects%'
